taxonomy: ansatz §110 (one unstable ring = BH; outer unstable + inner stable = ultracompact mimicker)
verdict: GW250114 sits squarely in the ONE-RING (black hole) class: prompt ringdown = exact Kerr light-ring physics (three pipelines), decisive Kerr overtone, and NO two-ring signature — echoes null at the predicted Δt with reflectivity bounded ≲0.2. In §110's taxonomy every tested observable reads 'one ring'.
honest_limits: taxonomy-consistency, not a horizon proof; low-R or off-Δt mimickers survive
